title: Resident Proxy And Attach-First Operator Consoles
problem: The proxy lifetime is coupled to interactive TUI/GUI processes, which weakens long-running local proxy stability and recovery.

continue_policy.notes: Resident proxy, attach-first GUI/TUI, lightweight supervisor, crash markers, docs, and targeted verification are complete. Split OS-service installation or richer attached-TUI mutations into follow-ons if requested.
